evidence: Line 84: "Don't use the pip interface unless clearly needed." — 'clearly' is a vague condition without concrete signals
description: Vague qualifier 'clearly' weakens the instruction; the reader cannot determine what 'clearly needed' means without additional context
suggested_fix: Replace 'clearly needed' with explicit conditions such as 'unless a requirements.txt already exists and no uv.lock is present'

evidence: Line 71: "Only use `uv tool install` only when specifically requested" — 'only' appears twice in the same clause
description: Redundant double 'only' in the same sentence is a copy-editing error that reduces clarity
suggested_fix: Rewrite as: "Use `uv tool install` only when explicitly requested by the user."

description: 'quick one-off checks' uses vague 'quick'; colloquially acceptable but could be more precise
suggested_fix: Consider replacing 'quick one-off checks' with 'ad-hoc checks outside a project environment'

description: 'quick one-off checks' uses vague 'quick'; same pattern as ruff/SKILL.md
suggested_fix: Consider replacing 'quick one-off checks' with 'ad-hoc checks outside a project environment'

evidence: Line 27: args contains "ty@latest" — resolves to newest PyPI release at LSP server startup, not a fixed version
description: lspServers command uses ty@latest which always fetches the newest release; a breaking or compromised release auto-deploys to all plugin users
suggested_fix: Pin to a specific released version e.g. ty==0.0.0-alpha.6 and update alongside release notes
